entries.lean_statement:
theorem theorem_1 (N : ℕ) :
    ∃ (K D_X D_Z : ℕ → ℕ),
    (∃ (f g : ℕ → ℝ), f =O[Filter.atTop] (fun _ => (1 : ℝ)) ∧ g =O[Filter.atTop] (fun _ => (1 : ℝ)) ∧
    ∀ n, K n = ((n : ℝ) ^ (2 / 3 : ℝ) + f n) * (n : ℝ) ^ (2 / 3 : ℝ) ∧
    D_X n = ((n : ℝ) ^ (1 / 3 : ℝ) + g n) * (n : ℝ) ^ (1 / 3 : ℝ) ∧
    D_Z n = ((n : ℝ) + f n) * (n : ℝ)) ∧
    (∀ n, K n ∈ Set.Icc (n ^ (2 / 3 : ℕ) / 2) (2 * n ^ (2 / 3 : ℕ))) ∧
    (∀ n, D_X n ≥ n ^ (1 / 3 : ℕ) / 2) ∧
    (∀ n, D_Z n ∈ Set.Icc (n / 2) (2 * n))

entries.lean_statement:
theorem corollary_2 :
    ∃ (N K D : ℕ) (alpha : Type*) [MetricSpace alpha] [NormedAddCommGroup alpha] [InnerProductSpace ℝ alpha] [CompleteSpace alpha],
    ∃ (family : ℕ → (ℕ × ℕ × ℕ)),
      (∀ n, (family n).1 = N * n) ∧
      (∀ n, (family n).2.1 = K * n) ∧
      (∀ n, (family n).2.2 = D * n) ∧
      (∀ n, ∃ eps : ℕ → ℝ, eps =o[Filter.atTop] (fun _ => (1 : ℝ)) ∧ (K * n : ℝ) = (1 + eps n) * (N * n : ℝ) ^ (4 / 5 : ℝ)) ∧
      (∀ n, ∃ delta : ℕ → ℝ, delta =o[Filter.atTop] (fun _ => (1 : ℝ)) ∧ (D * n : ℝ) = (1 + delta n) * (N * n : ℝ) ^ (3 / 5 : ℝ))
